cases.name: cursor_only
cases.sql: WHERE m.Id > ?

cases.name: q_only
cases.sql: WHERE (m.VideoCode LIKE ? OR m.ActorName LIKE ? OR m.SupportingActors LIKE ?)

cases.name: q_and_perfect_match
cases.sql: WHERE (m.VideoCode LIKE ? OR m.ActorName LIKE ? OR m.SupportingActors LIKE ?) AND m.PerfectMatchIndicator = ?

cases.name: perfect_match_false
cases.sql: WHERE m.PerfectMatchIndicator = ?

cases.name: actor_only
cases.sql: WHERE m.ActorName = ?

cases.name: hi_res_true
cases.sql: WHERE m.HiResIndicator = ?

cases.name: hi_res_false
cases.sql: WHERE m.HiResIndicator = ?

cases.name: session_only
cases.sql: WHERE m.SessionId = ?

cases.name: actor_hires_session
cases.sql: WHERE m.ActorName = ? AND m.HiResIndicator = ? AND m.SessionId = ?

cases.name: date_range_cursor
cases.sql: WHERE m.Id > ? AND m.DateTimeCreated >= ? AND m.DateTimeCreated <= ?

cases.name: empty
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m

cases.name: cursor_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.Id > ?

cases.name: q_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE (m.VideoCode LIKE ? OR m.ActorName LIKE ? OR m.SupportingActors LIKE ?)

cases.name: q_and_perfect_match
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE (m.VideoCode LIKE ? OR m.ActorName LIKE ? OR m.SupportingActors LIKE ?) AND m.PerfectMatchIndicator = ?

cases.name: perfect_match_false
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.PerfectMatchIndicator = ?

cases.name: actor_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.ActorName = ?

cases.name: hi_res_true
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.HiResIndicator = ?

cases.name: hi_res_false
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.HiResIndicator = ?

cases.name: session_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.SessionId = ?

cases.name: actor_hires_session
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.ActorName = ? AND m.HiResIndicator = ? AND m.SessionId = ?

cases.name: date_range_cursor
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM MovieHistory m WHERE m.Id > ? AND m.DateTimeCreated >= ? AND m.DateTimeCreated <= ?

cases.name: cursor_only
cases.sql: WHERE t.Id > ?

cases.name: q_only
cases.sql: WHERE m.VideoCode LIKE ?

cases.name: resolution_only
cases.sql: WHERE t.ResolutionType = ?

cases.name: has_subtitle_true
cases.sql: WHERE t.SubtitleIndicator = ?

cases.name: has_subtitle_false
cases.sql: WHERE t.SubtitleIndicator = ?

cases.name: uncensored_true
cases.sql: WHERE t.CensorIndicator = 0

cases.name: uncensored_false
cases.sql: WHERE t.CensorIndicator != 0

cases.name: session_only
cases.sql: WHERE t.SessionId = ?

cases.name: resolution_subtitle_uncensored
cases.sql: WHERE t.ResolutionType = ? AND t.SubtitleIndicator = ? AND t.CensorIndicator != 0

cases.name: date_range_cursor
cases.sql: WHERE t.Id > ? AND t.DateTimeCreated >= ? AND t.DateTimeCreated <= ?

cases.name: empty
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId

cases.name: cursor_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.Id > ?

cases.name: q_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE m.VideoCode LIKE ?

cases.name: resolution_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.ResolutionType = ?

cases.name: has_subtitle_true
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.SubtitleIndicator = ?

cases.name: has_subtitle_false
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.SubtitleIndicator = ?

cases.name: uncensored_true
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.CensorIndicator = 0

cases.name: uncensored_false
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.CensorIndicator != 0

cases.name: session_only
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.SessionId = ?

cases.name: resolution_subtitle_uncensored
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.ResolutionType = ? AND t.SubtitleIndicator = ? AND t.CensorIndicator != 0

cases.name: date_range_cursor
cases.sql: SELECT MIN(COUNT(*), 10000) AS cnt FROM TorrentHistory t JOIN MovieHistory m ON m.Id = t.MovieHistoryId WHERE t.Id > ? AND t.DateTimeCreated >= ? AND t.DateTimeCreated <= ?

cases.name: default
cases.sql: SELECT Id, Status, WriteMode, RunId, RunAttempt, DateTimeCreated, ReportType, ReportDate, FailureReason FROM ReportSessions ORDER BY Id DESC LIMIT ?

cases.name: state_only
cases.sql: SELECT Id, Status, WriteMode, RunId, RunAttempt, DateTimeCreated, ReportType, ReportDate, FailureReason FROM ReportSessions WHERE Status = ? ORDER BY Id DESC LIMIT ?

cases.name: state_and_cursor
cases.sql: SELECT Id, Status, WriteMode, RunId, RunAttempt, DateTimeCreated, ReportType, ReportDate, FailureReason FROM ReportSessions WHERE Status = ? AND Id < ? ORDER BY Id DESC LIMIT ?

cases.name: success_rate
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(DateTimeCreated), CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Status='committed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM ReportSessions WHERE DateTimeCreated >= ? GROUP BY DATE(DateTimeCreated) ORDER BY DATE(DateTimeCreated)

cases.name: movies
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(rs.DateTimeCreated) AS d, COUNT(rm.Id) FROM ReportSessions rs LEFT JOIN ReportMovies rm ON rm.SessionId = rs.Id WHERE rs.DateTimeCreated >= ? GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

cases.name: torrents
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(rs.DateTimeCreated) AS d, COUNT(rt.Id) FROM ReportSessions rs LEFT JOIN ReportMovies rm ON rm.SessionId = rs.Id LEFT JOIN ReportTorrents rt ON rt.ReportMovieId = rm.Id WHERE rs.DateTimeCreated >= ? GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

cases.name: history_growth
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(DateTimeCreated), COUNT(*) FROM MovieHistory WHERE DateTimeCreated >= ? GROUP BY DATE(DateTimeCreated) ORDER BY DATE(DateTimeCreated)

cases.name: pikpak
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(DateTimeUploadedToPikpak), COUNT(*) FROM PikpakHistory WHERE DateTimeUploadedToPikpak >= ? GROUP BY DATE(DateTimeUploadedToPikpak) ORDER BY DATE(DateTimeUploadedToPikpak)

cases.name: dedup
cases.sql: SELECT DATE(DateTimeDetected), COALESCE(SUM(ExistingFolderSize), 0) FROM DedupRecords WHERE IsDeleted=1 AND DateTimeDetected >= ? GROUP BY DATE(DateTimeDetected) ORDER BY DATE(DateTimeDetected)

cases.name: all
cases.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='queued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS queued, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='downloading' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS downloading, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='stalled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS stalled, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed, COUNT(*) AS total FROM AcquisitionOutcome

cases.name: no_state
cases.sql: SELECT qb_hash, video_code, href, category, state, queued_at, completed_at, last_seen_at FROM AcquisitionOutcome ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: with_state
cases.sql: SELECT qb_hash, video_code, href, category, state, queued_at, completed_at, last_seen_at FROM AcquisitionOutcome WHERE state = ? ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: default
cases.sql: SELECT substr(last_seen_at, 1, 10) AS d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='stalled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS stalled, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN state='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed FROM AcquisitionOutcome WHERE state IN ('completed','stalled','failed') AND last_seen_at >= ? GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

cases.name: all
cases.sql: SELECT source, COUNT(DISTINCT video_code) AS unique_titles, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN present = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS present_rows, COALESCE(SUM(size), 0) AS total_bytes FROM OwnershipLedger WHERE present = 1 GROUP BY source ORDER BY source

cases.name: all
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT video_code) AS total_owned_titles FROM OwnershipLedger WHERE present = 1

cases.name: no_source
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source, category, path, size, present, observed_at FROM OwnershipLedger ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, source, category LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: with_source
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source, category, path, size, present, observed_at FROM OwnershipLedger WHERE source = ? ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, source, category LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: all
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_signals, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN watched = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS watched_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN watched = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unwatched_count, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT video_code) AS unique_titles, COUNT(DISTINCT instance) AS instance_count FROM ConsumptionSignal

cases.name: all
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS unresolved_count FROM UnresolvedMediaItem

cases.name: no_filters
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source_type, instance, library_id, library_name, watched, progress_pct, play_count, rating, watched_at, resolved_confidence, observed_at FROM ConsumptionSignal ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, instance, library_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: watched_true
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source_type, instance, library_id, library_name, watched, progress_pct, play_count, rating, watched_at, resolved_confidence, observed_at FROM ConsumptionSignal WHERE watched = 1 ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, instance, library_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: watched_false
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source_type, instance, library_id, library_name, watched, progress_pct, play_count, rating, watched_at, resolved_confidence, observed_at FROM ConsumptionSignal WHERE watched = 0 ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, instance, library_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: instance_and_watched
cases.sql: SELECT video_code, source_type, instance, library_id, library_name, watched, progress_pct, play_count, rating, watched_at, resolved_confidence, observed_at FROM ConsumptionSignal WHERE instance = ? AND watched = 1 ORDER BY observed_at DESC, video_code, instance, library_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: default
cases.sql: SELECT substr(watched_at, 1, 10) AS d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN watched = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS watched, COUNT(*) AS total_signals FROM ConsumptionSignal WHERE watched_at IS NOT NULL AND watched_at >= ? GROUP BY d ORDER BY d

cases.name: no_instance
cases.sql: SELECT instance, source_type, library_id, library_name, item_id, raw_title, file_path, observed_at FROM UnresolvedMediaItem ORDER BY observed_at DESC, instance, library_id, item_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

cases.name: with_instance
cases.sql: SELECT instance, source_type, library_id, library_name, item_id, raw_title, file_path, observed_at FROM UnresolvedMediaItem WHERE instance = ? ORDER BY observed_at DESC, instance, library_id, item_id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
